brief_notes: Decision-making under ambiguity paper. Key numbers verified: 91 participants, 4 failed task, 6 missed sessions, 71 cognitively healthy after MoCA<26 exclusion, 32 females, age 18-88 mean 49.68±22.3, probabilities 25/50/75%, ambiguity 24/50/74%, V=5/8/12/25 dollars, NUTS 1000 draws/1000 tuning/80% acceptance, slope 0.76 [0.63, 0.91] medical, 0.37 [0.29, 0.44] online. 4 figures, 4 tables. Reasonable writing.
